name: network-desk
description: Your cloud networking AI team for GitHub Copilot CLI — one coordinator routing to 20 specialist skills across Azure, AWS, GCP and 14 firewall vendors (VNet/VPC design, firewall, load balancing, DNS, Private Link, hybrid, security, troubleshooting, vWAN/SD-WAN, monitoring, multi-cloud, pricing, IaC, containers, CDN, automation, SASE/SSE, capacity, IPv6, reporting).

skills.name: network-desk-capabilities
skills.description: 🧭 Network Desk Capabilities — overview and index of all 20 cloud-networking specialists (with emoji icons) plus example prompts. Load this whenever the user asks what Network Desk can do, its capabilities, the list of specialists/skills, or for examples of how to use the plugin.

skills.name: network-desk-cdn
skills.description: 🌐 CDN & Edge Networking — CDN & Edge Networking. Front Door/CloudFront/Cloud CDN, edge routing, caching, edge WAF. Use for: CDN, content, delivery, Front, Door, CloudFront, Cloud, edge, routing, compute, cache, optim, strateg, key.

skills.name: network-desk-cnet
skills.description: 🐳 Container Networking — Container Networking. CNI selection, network policy, service mesh, ingress, multi-cluster (AKS/EKS/GKE). Use for: CNI, container, kubernetes, k8s, polic, ies, service, mesh, istio, linkerd, cilium, calico, ingress, controller.

skills.name: network-desk-dns
skills.description: 🌐 DNS Specialist — DNS. Zone/resolver design, DNSSEC, record audits, migrations, resolution debugging. Use for: DNS, domain, name, resolution, Route, Cloud, Private, zone, resolver, forward, record, migration, split, horizon.

skills.name: network-desk-doc
skills.description: 📄 Report Builder — Documentation & Reporting. Use ONLY to package cloud-networking findings produced by Network Desk specialists into polished deliverables (Markdown/HTML/PDF/DOCX/XLSX). Do the networking analysis with a domain specialist first, then use this to render it. Polished MD/HTML/PDF/DOCX reports & XLSX models from any specialist's findings.

skills.name: network-desk-fw
skills.description: 🔥 Firewall Engineer — Firewall Engineering. Rule audits, policy design/test, vendor migration, config gen, HA, log analysis (14 vendors). Use for: firewall, rule, policy, PAN, FortiGate, FortiOS, Check, Point, CloudGuard, ASA, FTD, Firepower, SRX, Zscaler.

skills.name: network-desk-hyb
skills.description: 🔗 Hybrid Connectivity — Hybrid Connectivity. VPN, ExpressRoute/Direct Connect, BGP, bandwidth, failover/redundancy. Use for: ExpressRoute, Direct, Connect, Cloud, Interconnect, S2S, VPN, P2S, site, point, gateway, IPsec, IKEv, BGP.

skills.name: network-desk-iac
skills.description: 📐 IaC Generator — IaC Generator. Bicep, Terraform, Ansible, ARM for networking resources. Use for: bicep, terraform, arm, template, ansible, infra, structure, code, IaC, generate, deployment, deploy, ing.

skills.name: network-desk-ipv6
skills.description: 🔢 IPv6 Migration — IPv6 Migration. Dual-stack design, transition planning, addressing, NAT64/DNS64, troubleshooting. Use for: IPv6, dual, stack, NAT64, DNS64, XLAT, migrat, transition, address, compat, SLAAC, GUA, ULA, link.
